THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORGREN DONALD JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TABIOS HORLING $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
